01.trap: Asserts the infinite loop as the established cause of the cost spike (loop -> spike) and acts on it (code rewrite), though problem.txt only confirms the spike, not the loop.

02.trap: Asserts a downstream retry storm as the established cause and acts on it, though problem.txt confirms neither the retry storm nor any cause.

03.note: Explicitly treats the loop as an unconfirmed hypothesis and recommends verification (logs, X-Ray) before any corrective action.

04.note: Acts only on confirmed facts (the spike): a reversible cost cap to stop the bleeding while the cause is investigated. Asserts no unverified cause.
